column4: Better Auth user schema includes admin authorization fields
column5:
1. Review prisma/schema.prisma
2. Verify the Better Auth user table has role and enabled fields
3. Verify no public self-registration UI is introduced
column6: User records can support a single admin role check and account disabling; no self-registration UI exists
column14: Step 3 must wire server-side auth behavior

column4: Admin list DTO excludes proposal body and submitter contact
column5:
1. Run npm test
2. Verify admin list DAL test
3. Confirm returned list item has no body or submitterContact field
column6: Admin list DTO includes only approved list fields and excludes proposal body and submitter contact

column4: Unauthenticated user is rejected from admin boundary
column5:
1. Run npm test
2. Verify admin auth boundary route test for unauthenticated access
3. Confirm the response status is 401 and no administrator data is returned
column6: Unauthenticated access does not return administrator data

column4: Authenticated user without admin role is rejected where feasible
column5:
1. Run npm test
2. Verify admin authorization helper and boundary route tests
3. Confirm non-admin or disabled users are rejected safely
column6: A missing or non-admin role cannot access administrator data
column14: Step 3 auth helper and route tests

column4: Admin user can access proposal list and detail
column5:
1. Login as an administrator
2. Open proposal list
3. Open proposal detail
column6: Administrator can view approved administrator fields only

column4: Enabled admin user is accepted by the server-side admin boundary
column5:
1. Run npm test
2. Verify admin authorization helper and boundary route tests
3. Confirm the route returns only user id, email, and role for an enabled admin
column6: Enabled admin users can pass the admin boundary without session secrets being returned

column5:
1. POST to /api/auth/sign-up/email with a non-admin email and password
2. Verify the request fails
3. Verify no user is created for that email
column6: Normal public self-registration cannot create a user

column4: Unauthenticated user is rejected from admin proposal list reads
column5:
1. Run npm test
2. Verify admin proposal read test for unauthenticated list access
3. Confirm the proposal DAL is not called
column6: Unauthenticated access does not read or return proposal data
column14: Step 5 admin read authorization boundary test

column4: Unauthorized user is rejected from admin proposal detail reads
column5:
1. Run npm test
2. Verify admin proposal read test for unauthorized detail access
3. Confirm the proposal DAL is not called
column6: Non-admin or disabled users cannot read proposal detail data
column14: Step 5 admin read authorization boundary test

column4: Enabled admin can read proposal list DTOs
column5:
1. Run npm test
2. Verify admin proposal read test for allowed list access
3. Confirm list DTOs exclude proposal body and submitter contact
column6: Enabled admin users can read proposal list items with approved list fields only

column4: Enabled admin can read proposal detail and status history
column5:
1. Run npm test
2. Verify admin proposal read test for allowed detail access
3. Confirm detail DTO includes proposal body, optional submitter contact, and status history
column6: Enabled admin users can read approved detail fields and status history

column4: Nonexistent admin proposal detail returns safe not-found data
column5:
1. Run npm test
2. Verify admin proposal read test for missing detail
3. Confirm null is returned without exposing database details
column6: Missing proposal detail is handled safely without internal details

column4: Admin proposal list and detail manual verification
column5:
1. Login as an enabled admin
2. Open /admin/proposals
3. Open one proposal detail from the list
4. Confirm optional submitter information appears only on administrator screens
5. Confirm submitter contact and full proposal body are shown on the administrator detail screen only
6. Confirm proposal body and submitter information are not written to app logs
column6: Admin read screens are reachable only by an enabled admin and display approved administrator fields
column14: Required before Step 6 status change implementation

column4: Unauthenticated admin proposal routes are rejected manually
column5:
1. Clear browser session or use a private window
2. Open /admin/proposals
3. Open /admin/proposals/{id}
4. Confirm proposal data, submitter contact, and proposal body are not shown
column6: Unauthenticated users cannot view administrator proposal data
column14: Required before Step 6 status change implementation
